text:
Vibe Coding Is the New Product Management

“There’s been a shift—a marked pronouncement in the last year and especially in the last few months—most pronounced by Claude Code, which is a specific model that has a coding engine in it, which is so good that I think now you have vibe

THE MOST POWERFUL VIBECODING PROMPT FOR YOUR AI AGENT

Copy prompt below.

---

Role:  
You are now my Technical co-founder. Your job is to help me build a real product I can use, share, or launch. Handle all the building, but keep me in the loop and in control.

My Idea:

Vibe coding levels

The quicker you get to level 5, the richer you’ll become.

Level 0: Ask ChatGPT questions
Level 1: Vibe code small tools for your daily life (on Claude)
Level 2: Hire VAs to delegate implementation
Level 3: Systemise (SOPs + templates + checklists + ship every

the vibe marketing playbook (free)

hours of capturing and documenting real AI marketing work, packaged into a playbook for you to copy and apply

same exact stuff I use to grow my own businesses

- how to stack prompts, skills, mcps
- tools I use
- Claude Code for marketing /

This is how I run my 10 AI employee company. 

Coding in 2026 is dead. 

Prompting > Coding
Thinking > Acting
AI Agents > Humans

This is the future of business.

vibe coding is turning your ideas into reality without any coding knowledge

no prompt engineering or shit, you just chat with ai to build, enhance, fix, and upgrade your app

i bet many of you have great app ideas that can gain a good traction overnight

see how 
@mert
 created

Incredible how many vibe coding tool startups are launching left and right.

It's become so trivial to build one of these (you can do it in a few hundred lines of code on top of a cutting-edge LLM like Claude/Gemini/ChatGPT) that it's no wonder.

It's becoming a marketing game

Naval just dropped ~50 mins on AI, coding, and what's actually changing.

The clearest mental models I've heard on this topic.

My notes:

𝟭. 𝗩𝗶𝗯𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗶𝘀 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁 𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁.

You can now describe an app in plain English, and the AI

For anyone who still thinks AI can’t build real backend systems here’s my proof doing the talking 

I vibe coded a complete 21-page sales dashboard application with a fully integrated database and end-to-end functionality entirely using Codex GPT 5.3 model.

It took around

Vibe coding B2C apps.
Marketing on social media (TikTok, Reels, Shorts).
Target: $10k MRR.
Quit 9-5

I’m 100% convinced this will be the 2026 trend.

AI lowers the barrier to build.
Social media lowers the cost to distribute.

If you can:
> Ship fast
> Read the algo
> Turn

Roadmap to Becoming a Vibe Coder in 2026:

Choose and set up AI tools:

> Replit
> Gemini 
> Cursor AI  
> Claude AI  

Learn how to write a good prompt with AI.

Learn basics about:

> AI  (Stripe,OpenAI)
> Databases  
> Git and Github
> Languages (which one is good)
>

BREAKING: Goodbye App Developers.

Emergent AI just launced the world's first agentic vibe coding platform.

You can now builds apps, games, Chrome extensions, and more.

7 powerful use cases + how to try:

1. A gamified python learning app

Google AI Studio just got a ridiculously massive upgrade: full-stack vibe coding 

Now, anyone can whip up production-ready apps with authentication, databases, and real API integrations—using just a single prompt.

5 insane examples + their corresponding prompts ()

We’re watching software go from:
“write code -->build product”
to
“describe intent --> generate system”
“Vibe coding” isn’t a meme anymore
It’s the beginning of intent-driven development.
And this shift is Massive.
Think like-
Made a AI Voicebot to give instructions ---> OpenClaw

In 2026, I’m leveling up in public.

I’m getting better at coding, learning OpenClaw/OpenCode to vibe-code app ideas, and improving how I prompt AI to actually make life easier.

Not pretending to be an expert.
Just committed to getting better every day.

3. The "Voice Mimic" Brand Specialist

"I am going to provide you with three samples of successful copy from my brand. Analyze the syntax, tone, sentence length, and 'vibe.' Once analyzed, write a 5-email welcome sequence for [New Launch] that is indistinguishable from this brand

3x growth in one day. Vibe-coding dropped the cost of shipping to near zero.

Now the real question: how many of these vibe-coded products survive past week 2? Building fast is solved. Building something people keep opening is still a human-judgment problem.

vibe coding was 2025

2026 is vibe gtm

AI finds the leads
AI starts the conversations
AI books the meetings

Closers will close
